query: INSERT INTO current (workspace_id, skill_id, commit_id, epoch, seq, signed_record, updated_at, display_name) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, skill_id) DO UPDATE SET commit_id = excluded.commit_id, epoch = excluded.epoch, seq = excluded.seq, signed_record = excluded.signed_record, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, display_name = COALESCE(excluded.display_name, current.display_name)
